props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, disables the tab so it cannot be selected.

props.name: heading
props.description: The text label for this tab. Can also pass React nodes for custom heading content.

props.name: slug
props.description: URL-friendly identifier for the tab, used for hash-based navigation.
